title: stelis calyptrata
intro: Stelis calyptrata is a type of orchid, specifically a species of epiphytic orchid, native to tropical regions of Central and South America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, sore throats, and coughs, due to its expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Stelis calyptrata can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
